prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical fashion portrait of an adult East Asian woman, about 24 years old, standing inside an older commuter train beside an open window on a bright sunny day. She is leaning forward with both hands resting on the metal window ledge, torso turned back over her shoulder to look directly at the camera with a soft, calm expression and slight smile. She has long dark brown hair, loose and windblown across her face and down her back, natural makeup, clear skin, and delicate facial features. Outfit: a semi-sheer pale beige short-sleeve cropped top with side tie strings and fitted blue denim cuffed short shorts with visible back pockets and stitching. Composition is a three-quarter rear view from mid-thigh upward, centered slightly to the right, with the train window framing her upper body and a blue vinyl train seat partially visible at lower left. Background outside the window is overexposed and softly blurred, showing green trees and indistinct buildings. Use natural backlighting, warm sunlight, airy highlights, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, soft lens bloom, subtle film-like color grading, and high-detail editorial photography. Canvas: vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio. Constraints: adult subject only, tasteful fashion photography, no nudity, no explicit pose, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical fashion portrait of an adult East Asian woman, about 24 years old, standing inside an older commuter train beside an open window on a bright sunny day. She is leaning forward with both hands resting on the metal window ledge, torso turned back over her shoulder to look directly at the camera with a soft, calm expression and slight smile. She has long dark brown hair, loose and windblown across her face and down her back, natural makeup, clear skin, and delicate facial features. Outfit: a semi-sheer pale beige short-sleeve cropped top with side tie strings and fitted blue denim cuffed short shorts with visible back pockets and stitching. Composition is a three-quarter rear view from mid-thigh upward, centered slightly to the right, with the train window framing her upper body and a blue vinyl train seat partially visible at lower left. Background outside the window is overexposed and softly blurred, showing green trees and indistinct buildings. Use natural backlighting, warm sunlight, airy highlights, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, soft lens bloom, subtle film-like color grading, and high-detail editorial photography. promptZh: 创作一张写实的竖版时尚人像，主角是一位大约 24 岁的东亚女性，站在一辆老式通勤列车内，靠在明媚阳光下的开窗旁。她身体前倾，双手搭在金属窗台上，上半身回转，越过肩膀直视镜头，表情柔和从容，带着淡淡的微笑。她留着 深棕色长发，发丝随风飘动，散落在脸庞和背部，妆容自然，皮肤通透，五官精致。服装：一件浅米色半透明短袖露脐上衣，侧面系带，搭配合身的蓝色牛仔翻边短裤，可见后袋和缝线细节。构图为从大腿中部向上的四分之三背影，略微偏右，列车窗框勾勒出她的上半身，左下角可见部分蓝色乙烯基列车座椅。窗外背景过度曝光并经过柔焦处理，隐约可见绿树和模糊的建筑。采用自然逆光、温暖阳光、通透高光、浅景深、写实的皮肤纹理、柔和的镜头光晕、细腻的电影感调色，以及高细节的编辑摄影风格。画布：9:16 竖版智能手机比例。约束条件：仅限成年主体，高雅的时尚摄影，无裸露，无露骨姿势，无文字，无水印，无其他人物。
